description: Curated Great League opponent weights used by the offline ranking reweight model. These weights are intentionally editable and represent expected meta relevance, not final rankings.

roleGlossary.lead: Often useful as an opener or alignment setter.
roleGlossary.safe-swap: Can absorb imperfect alignment or force progress.
roleGlossary.closer: Improves when shields are down or resources are controlled.
roleGlossary.shield-pressure: Forces shield decisions with cheap or threatening charged moves.
roleGlossary.debuff: Can change matchup texture through debuff pressure.
roleGlossary.generalist: Broad neutral utility without one extreme role.
